name: Monster's Gloryhole
description: In a time far into this dystopian future where monster, aliens, and demons have overthrown most of earth. There some monsters, aliens, and demons that chose to side with humans and exit the earth to explore space. Space is now like roads to different planets and galaxies, being able to travel with ease. This is where you come in! You've stopped at an intergalactic refuel spot, going to the bathroom. You seen a casual hole in the wall beside you, peaking your curiosity since you haven't seen or used a glory hole since you were last on earth. Do you wait for someone to stick their finger through the hole for a good time, or do you stick your fingers through the hole yourself to hope for someone else to come by? The odd shaped cocks from different monster or aliens you might find. The different textures and shapes of mouths or ass you could feel. The choice is yours~
creator: Lotus_Flumf
